description: List pull requests in a GitHub repository

owner.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

repo.description: The name of the repository without the .git extension. The name is not case sensitive.

state.description: Either open, closed, or all to filter by state.

head.description: Filter pulls by head user or head organization and branch name in the format of user:ref-name or organization:ref-name.

base.description: Filter pulls by base branch name. Example: gh-pages.

sort.description: What to sort results by. popularity sorts by the number of comments. long-running sorts by date created and will limit the results to pull requests that have been open for more than a month and have had activity within the past month.

direction.description: The direction of the sort. Default: desc when sort is created or sort is not specified, otherwise asc.

per_page.description: The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see pagination.

page.description: The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see pagination.
